visualizations.title: Anatomy of Multiplication
visualizations.description: The parts of a multiplication equation: factors and the resulting product.

steps.explanation: Factors: The numbers that are multiplied together.
Multiplication Sign: The symbol representing the operation.
Product: The final result of scaling the factors.

visualizations.title: Grid Array Model (3 × 4 = 12)
visualizations.description: Visualizing multiplication as an array of rows and columns to illustrate repeated addition.
